item.title: The invisible kid
item.description: The story unfolds when I was 14 years old. I was in my second year in all boys high school. At that time is was already evident that I struggled with school. The whole idea of structured learning grated my soul. Anyhow it was 2 term and parents teacher consultations for all form 2’s pupils scheduled. The process goes something like this. After school day. Class then ending at 1pm all the parent would pitch up and meet the teachers and get a 1 on 1 update or insights into their children’s performance.
